'''鈭歴h-v-th-b''' ('''kashavtheboko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:fleme|fleme]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-v-th-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fleme|fleme]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴h-v-th-b
|-
! Lemma
| kashavtheboko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thishavtheboko|thishavtheboko]] || [[word:jishavtheboko|jishavtheboko]] || [[word:shishavtheboko|shishavtheboko]] || [[word:kishavtheboko|kishavtheboko]]
